## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content quality improvement and workflow challenges with the GrowthX delivery team.](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality varies; \~30% meets high standards, but improvements needed in writing style, structure, and client-specific customization](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Workflow issues causing significant manual work; need better client-specific calibration and writing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Engineering team communication and deployment process needs improvement; lack of testing environment causing disruptions](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Assessment

  - [\~30% of sampled articles meet high standards; others need improvement](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Key issues: overuse of colons in titles, repetitive structures, lack of narrative flow](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Recommendations:](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Avoid "X: Y" title format unless absolutely necessary](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Transform outline-like content into 2-5 sentence paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [Vary content structure to avoid repetitive patterns](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

### Client-Specific Calibration

  - [New process: Sprint team handles initial weeks for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Detailed writing instructions document created for each client (e.g., AIMBIT)](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Instructions include client preferences, technical details, and audience considerations](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Goal: Improve initial output quality and reduce manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

### Workflow and Engineering Challenges

  - [Recent workflow breakdowns, particularly for RPod and DataGrid clients](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Lack of communication channel with engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [No testing environment; changes deployed directly to production](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Opacity in workflow functionality and requirement gathering process](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### Proposed Solutions

  - [Create dedicated channel for reporting delivery team issues](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Implement controlled sandbox/pre-prod environment for testing](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Improve communication between delivery and engineering teams](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Monthly meetings to collect and prioritize feedback for engineering](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create new channel for reporting delivery team issues](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Implement pre-production testing environment for workflow changes](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Schedule monthly meetings to gather and prioritize engineering feedback](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Develop client-specific writing instruction documents for all clients](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Review and improve workflow customization process for new and existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/bTh4AsxxUaELat3U7r1mxKhC2zzaJxE4?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
